system.requirement: Once you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.287bb4c2b53ea847]{Forge a Bond} (formidable or greater) with an elf, and are gifted a mask of precious elderwood…

abilities.description:
Choose your mask’s material.

  • Thunderwood: Edge & Health
  • Bloodwood: Iron & Health
  • Ghostwood: Shadow & Spirit
  • Whisperwood: Wits & Spirit

When you wear the mask and make a move which uses its stat, add +1. If you roll a 1 on your action die, make a suffer move (-1) to the associated track (in addition to any other outcome of the move).
As above, and you may instead add +2 and make a suffer move (-2) (decide before rolling).

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0cfcd6fbaf6135d0]{Face Death} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff17e67a59539df4]{Face Desolation} while wearing the mask, you may roll +its stat (instead of +heart).
